THE COURT ORDERS THE 5 SUBROGATION ACTIONS (CASES CGC-13-535195, CGC-13-535876, CGC-13-536381, CGC-537218, AND CGC-14-539565) TO BE CONSOLIDATED FOR TRIAL PURPOSES. THE PARTIES ARE ALSO ORDERED TO COORDINATE ALL DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE. CASE CGC-13-535195 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE NUMBER. Atty. JACOB KOPER of the Law Offices of John A. Biard, Tel No. (916) 638-6610 appearing for Defendants Squat and Gobble Cafe, LLC and Issa Sweidan;
Atty. JAY D. HARKER of Clausen Miller, PC, Tel No. (949) 260-3100 appearing telephonically for Scottsdale Insurance Company in San Francisco Superior Court case no. CGC-14-542461.

Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Continued To Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar Aug-27-2014 Text Ruling

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-535195, CGC-13-535876, CGC-13-536381, CGC-14-537218, CGC-14-539565 WITH CASE CGC-13-530607
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas LoSavio, Esq., 415.981.6630, for plaintiff Vin Debut LLC.
Jeffrey Korinko, Esq., 949.250.5551, for plaintiff Amco Insurance Company (CGC-13-535195).
Kevin Bush, Esq., 619.234.1700, for plaintiffs Continental Casualty Company and Valley Forge Insurance Company (CGC-13-535876).
Phil Foster, Esq., 415.626.7744, and Jacob Koper, Esq., 916.638.6610, for defendants Squat and Gobble Cafe, LLC, Squat and Gobble Restaurant Management LLC and Issa Sweidan.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT S&G RESTAURANT MANAGEMENT LLC'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-13-535195, CGC-13-535876, CGC-13-536381, CGC-14-537218, CGC-14-539565 WITH CASE CGC-13-530607 is granted in part. The court orders the 5 subrogation actions (cases CGC-13-535195, CGC-13-535876, CGC-13-536381, CGC-537218, and CGC-14-539565) to be consolidated for trial purposes. The parties are also ordered to coordinate all discovery and motion practice. Case CGC-13-535195 is designated the lead case number. The motion is denied as to the Vin Debut case (case CGC-13-530607). Vin Debut has a close trial date and consolidation will lead to a prejudicial delay. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Joinder In Motion To Consolidate
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas LoSavio, Esq., 415.981.6630, for plaintiff Vin Debut LLC.
Jeffrey Korinko, Esq., 949.250.5551, for plaintiff Amco Insurance Company (CGC-13-535195).
Kevin Bush, Esq., 619.234.1700, for plaintiffs Continental Casualty Company and Valley Forge Insurance Company (CGC-13-535876).
Phil Foster, Esq., 415.626.7744, and Jacob Koper, Esq., 916.638.6610, for defendants Squat and Gobble Cafe, LLC, Squat and Gobble Restaurant Management LLC and Issa Sweidan.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS SQUAT AND GOBBLE CAFE, LLC, ISSA SWEIDAN'S Joinder In Motion To Consolidate is granted in part. The court orders the 5 subrogation actions (cases CGC-13-535195, CGC-13-535876, CGC-13-536381, CGC-537218, and CGC-14-539565) to be onsolidated for trial purposes. The parties are also ordered to coordinate all discovery and motion practice. Case CGC-13-535195 is designated the lead case number. The motion is denied as to the Vin Debut case (case CGC-13-530607). Vin Debut has a close trial date and consolidation will lead to a prejudicial delay. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
